title: EeveeEmpire Cobblemon
description:
Welcome to the EeveeEmpire, a Fabric Cobblemon server.

This modpack has everything you need to join our server and have the best performance possible playing Cobblemon.
body:
🏵️ Eevee Empire🏵️ 

[https://discord.gg/wZAZy8FXxZ](https://discord.gg/wZAZy8FXxZ)


```
play.eeveeempire.com
```


🎖️ Welcome to the ultimate Cobblemon kingdom! Embark on your adventure in a realm crafted with a fresh new map and custom features, ensuring a relaxing and enjoyable experience for every player, and ready to grow.🎖️ 

- Over 150+ Extra Pokemon Added, & ExtraEeveelutions
- Player Gyms
- Beautiful EV Training Area
- Catch Combos & Stats
- Dex Ranks & Weekly Kits
- GriefDefender Claiming System
- Daycare/Breeding System
- Timed Legendary Spawning System
- TMs/TRs System
- Global Tasks & Trivia
- GTS, Wondertrade, & PokeSell
- Player Chest Shops
- Aesthetically Pleasing Chat Tags 
- Plushies :sparkles: 
- Bingo & Hunts
- Pokebuilder & Megas

🌟 Just like Eevee, your adventure can take many unique and exciting paths. Our server is always finding new ways to let you customize your experience! An empire's strength and splendor come from the community that builds it—brick by brick, soul by soul. Join us for a breathtaking Cobblemon journey and become part of something extraordinary! 🌟
